## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and refine the scope of work (SOW) for a content creation partnership between Hims and fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital will adjust the proposal to increase volume range and flexibility, allowing for scalability and content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [The focus will be on balancing automation with necessary human review, aiming for 10-20 cents per word cost](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Hims needs to solve for internal medical review capacity to match potential content output](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Both parties are committed to finding a mutually beneficial structure that allows for quality at scale](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)

## Topics

### Proposal Adjustments and Scalability

  - [Marcel will update the SOW to increase volume range and add language for content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Aim to provide flexibility for Hims to scale up once workflows are established](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)
  - [Considering a larger annual range instead of monthly commitments](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [fwd.digital is doubling the volume without changing the scope as an incentive](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)

### Content Creation Process and Quality Assurance

  - [fwd.digital uses complex AI workflows for research and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Editorial review remains a significant cost driver, ensuring quality and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Aim for 80% more efficient than traditional content creation methods](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Automated QA and fact-checking capabilities to be included in the first work stream](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)

### Cost Structure and Efficiency

  - [Target cost range of 10-20 cents per word](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Some research workflows cost a few dollars in compute alone](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [fwd.digital's approach balances cost-effectiveness with high-quality output](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Potential for future cost reductions through model fine-tuning and workflow optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

### Medical Review and Compliance

  - [Hims needs to determine internal capacity for medical review](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Challenge in finding medical professionals willing to endorse content without thorough review](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [fwd.digital confident in AI capabilities for accuracy, but acknowledges need for trusted sources](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [Emphasis on setting clear standards for medical content verification](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)

### AI Models and Technology

  - [fwd.digital primarily uses GPT-4 and GPT-3.5 models](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Not currently using or transitioning to models like Gemini](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Focuses on building adaptable workflows to incorporate new models efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to update SOW with increased volume range and flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Marcel to send revised proposal shortly after the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Mike to review internally with VP and team next week](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Aim for final decision by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [If approved, determine kickoff timeline and initial steps for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/x4A_776LcyKxAXZQQ6_Ri5qNW7ZbZKhY?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
